statement: The lipid mechanism is the CONSISTENT best-supported transport model: it wins EVERY measured dataset (in-sample Yamazaki, Tang OOS, Kim OOS), so the minimum win-margin across all three still exceeds 0.3 log10 -- it should be the recommended configuration (kept opt-in pending a reliable 2-pool root).

confidence.basis: threshold rule: statistic 'point'=0.649 > 0.3 is met (combine='latest', margin=0.349)
